concerns.text: FR-006 mandates that for collinear pairs, the system MUST 'suppress independent coefficient interpretation' and 'frame the relationship descriptively'. Task T023 only implements detection and JSON report generation. No task exists to update the baseline model output (T024-T026) or final report (T035) to enforce this descriptive framing constraint, risking a deliverable that interprets collinear coefficients independently.

FR-008 requires a confounder sensitivity analysis that 'reports the R² change' if proxy variables are present. Task T033 only implements the logic to log 'No proxy variables available' if missing. There is no task to perform the model refit with proxies or calculate/report the R² delta when proxies *are* present, violating the requirement to measure the impact of confounders.

SC-001 requires measuring statistical significance (p < 0.05) of the R² improvement via a 'permutation test'. Task T035 mentions 'significance p-values' but provides no task to implement or run a permutation test. Without this specific task, the success criterion cannot be verified, and the deliverable falls short of the spec's statistical rigor.

SC-002 requires a sensitivity analysis measuring the stability of the 'top-5 significant interaction terms' across a threshold sweep. Task T032 mentions 'reporting variation in significant terms' but lacks the explicit logic to identify the top-5 terms and calculate the percentage stability metric required by the success criterion. This is a semantic weakening of the acceptance criteria.

FR-006 requires suppressing independent coefficient interpretation for collinear pairs. Tasks T024-T026 implement baseline training and coefficient extraction but do not include logic to check the collinearity report (T023) and suppress/alter the interpretation of coefficients for flagged pairs. The deliverable will likely output standard coefficients without the required descriptive framing.
